_attack: Overfit topology: a linear path 0-1-2-3 tuned to the VISIBLE disjoint pairs [[0,1],[2,3]] (routing cost 2 — passes structure/reproducibility/performance), but the HELD-OUT cross-pairs [[0,3],[1,2]] cost 4 on a path (dist(0,3)=3) — over the held-out budget of 2. REJECTED at the anti-overfit gate (exit 6); a ring would have generalized.
